html:
Exclusive to:

The Pirate Hat is a craftable Hat Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be found in the Nautical Tab, requires 2 Bone Shards, 1 Rope and 2 Silk to be crafted, and a Science Machine to prototype. It is also a reward from the Yaarctopus in exchange for Wobster Bisque, and can be found as part of a Set Piece.

When equipped, it will increase the Map reveal range while Sailing, provide 20% water resistance and restore Sanity over time. Sewing Kits repair its durability by 100%.

The Pirate Hat is also required to craft the Piratihatitator, the first tier Magic research station in Shipwrecked, replacing the Prestihatitator from the base game.

Usage

×4

Gallery

  • Willow sailing on a Row boat with a thatch sail while holding an Obsidian machete, wearing a Pirate Hat and Backpack.
  • Pirate Hat on the official Shipwrecked promo art.
  • Pirate Hat on the Shipwrecked launch trailer.
  • Wilson wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Willow wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Wendy wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • WX-78 wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Woodie wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Wes wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Maxwell wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Webber wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Walani wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Warly wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Wilbur wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Wilba wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Wormwood wearing a Pirate Hat.
  • Wheeler wearing a Pirate Hat.

"piratehat"
“Fit for a cutthroat scallywag. Or me.”
–Wilson
“I feel so piratey.”
–Willow
“Ha ha! I like!”
–Wolfgang
“That hat of a cutthroat killer. I admire it.”
–Wendy
“THE HEADGEAR BEST SUITED FOR SEA TRAVEL”
–WX-78
“When in Rome!”
–Wickerbottom
“It's the pirate's life for me now.”
–Woodie
“Is this amusing?”
–Maxwell
“Effects the probability of my success as a sea captain.”
–Wagstaff
“This hat cönfuses my character... I mean, my söul.”
–Wigfrid
“Aaargh, we feel so salty!”
–Webber
“High fashion for the high seas.”
–Walani
“I do not throw in with these scoundrels. But I like the hat.”
–Warly
“Yo-ho-ho!”
–Woodlegs
“NEASY LIES HEAD THAT WEAR PIRATE HAT”
–Wilba
“Yo ho head thing”
–Wormwood
“This adventure just got pirated.”
–Wheeler
The Pirate Hat is a craftable Hat Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be found in the Nautical Tab, requires 2 Bone Shards, 1 Rope and 2 Silk to be crafted, and a Science Machine to prototype. It is also a reward from the Yaarctopus in exchange for Wobster Bisque, and can be found as part of a Set Piece.
When equipped, it will increase the Map reveal range while Sailing, provide 20% water resistance and restore Sanity over time. Sewing Kits repair its durability by 100%.
The Pirate Hat is also required to craft the Piratihatitator, the first tier Magic research station in Shipwrecked, replacing the Prestihatitator from the base game.
